subcategory: neumorphic dashboard template with collapsible sidebar
use_cases: Admin dashboard layouts with sidebar navigation for SaaS applications
Project management interfaces with collapsible menu structure
Analytics dashboards with dark/light mode theming
ai_summary: A neumorphic-styled dashboard template featuring a collapsible sidebar navigation with menu items, dark/light mode toggle, and soft inset/outset shadow effects typical of neumorphism design. Built with React state management for interactive menu selection and theme switching, providing a modern soft-UI aesthetic for admin and analytics interfaces.
